SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.template

Interface SqlTemplate

All Superinterfaces:
TemplateDecorator
All Known Implementing Classes:
SqlTemplateImpl
public interface SqlTemplate extends TemplateDecorator
A template processor for generating SQL queries. While this interface can be used directly, developers are encouraged to leverage the higher-level abstractions provided by the framework, as they are likely more useful and convenient for most use cases.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    SqlTemplate.BatchListener
    A listener for batch events within a SQL query context.
    static interface 
    SqlTemplate.BindVariables
    Manages the binding of variables in a SQL query.
    static final record 
    SqlTemplate.NamedParameter
    Represents a named parameter that can be used in an SQL query.
    static interface 
    SqlTemplate.Parameter
    Represents a parameter that can be used in an SQL query.
    static final record 
    SqlTemplate.PositionalParameter
    Represents a positional parameter that can be used in an SQL query.
    static interface 
    SqlTemplate.RecordListener
    A listener for record events within a SQL query context.

      The default SQL template that is optimized for prepared statements.

  • Method Details

    • createBindVars

      BindVars createBindVars()
      Create a new bind variables instance that can be used to add bind variables to a batch.
      Returns:
      a new bind variables instance.

    • positionalOnly

      boolean positionalOnly()
      Returns true if the template only support positional parameters, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if the template only support positional parameters, false otherwise.

    • expandCollection

      boolean expandCollection()
      Returns true if collection parameters must be expanded as multiple (positional) parameters, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if the template expands collection parameters, false otherwise.

    • withInlineParameters

      SqlTemplate withInlineParameters(boolean inlineParameters)
      Returns a new SQL template instance configured to inline parameters directly into the SQL string, rather than using bind variables.
      Parameters:
      inlineParameters - if true, parameters will be inlined as literals into the SQL. If false, parameters are passed via bind variables (default behavior).
      Returns:
      a new SqlTemplate instance configured with the specified parameter handling.
      Since:
      1.3

    • inlineParameters

      boolean inlineParameters()
      Indicates whether the SQL parameters should be inlined directly as literals into the SQL string, or whether bind variables should be used.

      Note that batch processing cannot be used when inlining parameters, as batch processing requires bind variables to be used for each parameter in the batch. This setting is therefore ignored when batch processing is used.

      Returns:
      true if parameters are inlined as literals; false if using bind variables.
      Since:
      1.3

    • withSupportRecords

      SqlTemplate withSupportRecords(boolean supportRecords)
      Returns a new SQL template with support for records enabled or disabled.
      Parameters:
      supportRecords - true if the template should support records, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      a new SQL template.

    • supportRecords

      boolean supportRecords()
      Returns true if the template supports tables represented as records, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if the template supports records, false otherwise.

      SqlTemplate withTableNameResolver(@Nonnull TableNameResolver resolver)
      Returns a new SQL template with the specified table name resolver.
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      resolver - the table name resolver.
      Returns:
      a new SQL template.

    • withDialect

      SqlTemplate withDialect(@Nonnull SqlDialect dialect)
      Returns a new SQL template with the specified SQL dialect.
      Parameters:
      dialect - the SQL dialect to use.
      Returns:
      a new SQL template.

    • dialect

      SqlDialect dialect()
      Returns the SQL dialect used by this template.
      Returns:
      the SQL dialect used by this template.
      Since:
      1.2

    • withConfig

      SqlTemplate withConfig(@Nonnull StormConfig config)
      Returns a new SQL template with the specified Storm configuration. The SQL dialect is re-resolved from the provided configuration.
      Parameters:
      config - the Storm configuration to apply.
      Returns:
      a new SQL template.
      Since:
      1.9

    • process

      Sql process(@Nonnull TemplateString template) throws SqlTemplateException
      Processes the specified template and returns the resulting SQL and parameters.
      Parameters:
      template - the string template to process.
      Returns:
      the resulting SQL and parameters.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException - if an error occurs while processing the input.
